keyboardEscapeCodes.title: +1 Speed Keyboard Escape Codes
keyboardEscapeCodes.subtitle: Redeem working codes and social rewards for free Speed. Use these boosts to clear early keyboard stages faster.
keyboardEscapeCodes.intro: Codes in +1 Speed Keyboard Escape mainly give flat Speed rewards, so they are best used when you are actively pushing stages or rebuilding Speed after an early rebirth.

items.howToClaim: Click the Code button on the top-left side of the screen, paste BYP4SS1, then press OK.
items.bestUse: Use it for an early boost or after an early rebirth so the flat Speed reward helps immediately.

items.howToClaim: Join the official Discord, open the Social-Code channel, press Get-Code, then paste the generated code into the in-game Code box.
items.bestUse: Generate and redeem it quickly because social codes are personal and time-limited.

items.howToClaim: Like the Roblox experience, join the game group, then claim the FREE lobby reward or treasure box.
items.bestUse: Claim it when you are ready to push stages, because it is a flat Speed reward.
Keep this listed so players do not waste time testing it.

keyboardEscapeBeginnerGuide.title: +1 Speed Keyboard Escape Beginner Guide
keyboardEscapeBeginnerGuide.subtitle: Learn the basic loop: gain Speed, cross keyboard stages, collect Wins, and stack multipliers.
keyboardEscapeBeginnerGuide.intro: +1 Speed Keyboard Escape is a Roblox obby where every step gives Speed. The goal is to train Speed, survive keyboard platforms, reach safe zones, collect Wins, and use upgrades to move faster over time.

steps.title: Start Building Speed
steps.description: Every step gives +1 Speed by default. Keep moving in the lobby or on stages to raise your Speed and level.
steps.playerGoal: Build enough Speed to clear the first keyboard obstacles.

steps.title: Run Across Keyboard Stages
steps.description: The course is made of keyboard keys. Run and jump carefully because one wrong step can send you back to the start.
steps.playerGoal: Reach the next safe zone without falling.

steps.title: Collect Wins From Yellow Pads
steps.description: Wins are collected from yellow pads after clearing stages. Wins are the main currency for upgrades.
steps.playerGoal: Farm stages you can clear consistently.

steps.title: Buy Trails and Auras
steps.description: Trails and Auras are passive boosts purchased with Wins. They stack with other Speed bonuses.
steps.playerGoal: Buy cheap upgrades first, then replace them with stronger ones.

steps.title: Use Treadmills for AFK Speed
steps.description: Treadmills at spawn let you gain Speed without constantly moving. The free Chocolate treadmill gives a x1 multiplier, while paid treadmills can give stronger multipliers.
steps.playerGoal: Use treadmills when you need steady Speed before a harder stage.

steps.title: Rebirth for Long-Term Progress
steps.description: Rebirth resets your current Speed level but gives a permanent multiplier. This makes later farming much faster.
steps.playerGoal: Rebirth once your next level requirement starts slowing down.

keyboardEscapeSpeedFarming.title: +1 Speed Keyboard Escape Speed Farming Guide
keyboardEscapeSpeedFarming.subtitle: Farm Speed faster by stacking steps, buttons, treadmills, Trails, Auras, boosts, and Rebirth multipliers.
keyboardEscapeSpeedFarming.intro: Speed farming is not just about walking. The fastest progress comes from stacking permanent Rebirth multipliers, equipping the best Trail and Aura, using treadmills, and farming Wins for better upgrades.

items.bestUse: Use from the start; every movement helps build early Speed.
items.notes: This is the base loop of the game.

items.bestUse: Stand on higher buttons when you have enough Wins to raise Speed per step.
items.notes: This is one of the simplest early upgrades.

items.speedGain: Chocolate treadmill: x1, Diamond treadmill: x9, Admin treadmill: x100
items.bestUse: Use treadmills for steady Speed farming or AFK farming.
items.notes: The free Chocolate treadmill is enough for early farming.

items.speedGain: Green Trail: 500 Wins, Blue Trail: 1,500 Wins, Purple Trail: 5,000 Wins, Red Trail: 25,000 Wins, Rainbow Trail: 100,000 Wins, Glow Aura: 1M Wins, Wind Aura: 5M Wins, Water Aura: 10M Wins, Fire Aura: 25M Wins, Void Trail: 50M Wins, Godlike Trail: 1B Wins
items.bestUse: Equip your best Trail and best Aura together.
items.notes: Trails and Auras stack with other Speed bonuses.

items.requirement: Reach the next rebirth level threshold
items.bestUse: Rebirth early when progress slows, then rebuild faster with the new multiplier.
items.notes: Rebirth resets your current Speed level but improves long-term farming.

items.bestUse: Claim early so every farming session benefits from the extra Aura.
items.notes: Record and upload a short public Medal clip, then claim the Aura in-game.

items.requirement: Codes, social code, or group gift
items.bestUse: Use after an early rebirth or before pushing harder stages.
items.notes: Flat Speed rewards help quickly, but they are not permanent multipliers.

keyboardEscapeRebirth.title: +1 Speed Keyboard Escape Rebirth Guide
keyboardEscapeRebirth.subtitle: Rebirth is the main long-term progression system. Reset your current Speed level to unlock stronger permanent multipliers.
keyboardEscapeRebirth.intro: Rebirthing is worth doing because it turns short-term Speed progress into permanent multiplier growth. Each rebirth requires a higher level, resets your current Speed level, and makes future farming faster.

milestones.bestAction: Do this early to start long-term multiplier stacking.
Rebuild Speed with walking, buttons, and treadmills.
Keep farming Wins so Trails and Auras scale with your rebirth progress.
Use free Speed rewards after rebirth if you want a quick stage push.
Start focusing harder on treadmill farming and higher-cost Trails or Auras.
Use this point to push into harder stage farming.
Farm Wins aggressively and keep your best Trail and Aura equipped.
Use the multiplier to farm late-game stages, stronger upgrades, and higher Win rewards.

keyboardEscapeTrailsAuras.title: +1 Speed Keyboard Escape Trails and Auras
keyboardEscapeTrailsAuras.subtitle: Trails and auras are multiplier gear, not just cosmetics. Equip one trail and one aura together, then keep upgrading in order as your Wins income grows.
keyboardEscapeTrailsAuras.intro: This tier list ranks the highest-value trails and auras by multiplier strength, unlock cost, and farming impact. Trails give the largest long-term boost, while auras add a second multiplier layer that stacks well with rebirths and treadmills.

tiers.label: Best Progression Value
tiers.summary: Use these when you want the biggest farming jump or the strongest free multiplier option.

items.name: Infinity Trail
items.bestFor: Premium endgame farming and leaderboard pushing

items.name: Medal Aura
items.bestFor: Best free aura for new players

tiers.label: Strong Mid-to-Late Upgrades
tiers.summary: These are efficient upgrades once basic trails stop carrying your stage clears.

items.name: Rainbow Trail
items.bestFor: Best early visual trail with useful speed value

tiers.label: Starter and Early Farming Picks
tiers.summary: Buy these in order so you are never stuck farming Wins with a weak multiplier.

items.name: Blue Trail
items.bestFor: Best first upgrade jump over Green

keyboardEscapeTreadmills.title: +1 Speed Keyboard Escape Treadmills
keyboardEscapeTreadmills.subtitle: Treadmills let your character farm Speed while standing still. The higher the treadmill multiplier, the faster you reach level gates, rebirth requirements, and harder worlds.
keyboardEscapeTreadmills.intro: Use the free Chocolate treadmill to start, then upgrade based on how often you play. Diamond is the best value jump, Candy is for long sessions, and Admin is the fastest treadmill currently listed for Speed farming.

items.name: Normal Running
items.bestFor: Learning routes and clearing early stages
items.recommendation: Use only while learning stages or collecting early Wins.

items.name: Chocolate Treadmill
pros: Lets you gain Speed without route running
cons: No multiplier advantage over base gain
items.recommendation: Use immediately, then replace when you can afford a paid treadmill.

items.name: Golden Treadmill
items.recommendation: Good for light spenders who want a simple early boost.

items.name: Diamond Treadmill
pros: Clear x9 jump over base gain
Strong balance of price and performance
cons: Still far below Candy and Admin
items.recommendation: Best buy for most regular players.

items.name: Candy Treadmill
pros: Works well with rebirths, trails, and auras
items.recommendation: Pick this if you farm for long sessions and want faster rebirth loops.

items.name: Admin Treadmill
pros: Fastest route to high rebirth requirements
items.recommendation: Best premium option when maximum Speed gain matters more than cost.

keyboardEscapeStages.title: +1 Speed Keyboard Escape Stages Walkthrough
keyboardEscapeStages.subtitle: Speed helps, but timing and route memory decide most hard stages. Use these stage notes to avoid resets and farm Wins more consistently.
keyboardEscapeStages.intro: The core rule is simple: every step gives Speed, but one wrong step sends you back. Build enough Speed first, then run each stage with a clear route plan instead of sprinting blindly.

steps.title: Prepare before pushing hard stages
steps.routeTip: Stack rebirths, your best trail, your best aura, and treadmill Speed before moving into harder worlds.
steps.resetRisk: Entering underleveled makes simple jumps feel inconsistent and wastes repeated attempts.
steps.rewardFocus: Clear shorter safe stages first to bank Wins for stronger buttons, trails, and auras.

steps.title: Use controlled speed on early parkour
steps.routeTip: At around 100 Speed, the parkour can be skipped with a strong jump. At very high speed, run straight through instead of overcorrecting jumps.
steps.resetRisk: Too much speed can make short jumps harder to control.
steps.rewardFocus: Use this stage to practice speed control before the timing stages.

steps.title: Wait for the bridge signal
steps.routeTip: Do not rush as soon as the countdown begins. Start when the on-screen wait signal appears so you get a better crossing window.
steps.resetRisk: Starting too early leaves less time to finish the bridge cleanly.
steps.rewardFocus: A clean bridge clear keeps your Wins route consistent.

steps.title: Time the chocolate tsunami
steps.routeTip: For Stage 6, wait until the wave is right in front of you, then move after it passes. For Stage 14, go as soon as the faster wave appears.
steps.resetRisk: Moving too early lets the wave catch you; hesitating on Stage 14 misses the timing window.
steps.rewardFocus: Stage 6 is also a useful repeat farm once you can clear it safely.

steps.title: Use the launcher shortcut
steps.routeTip: At the launch point, hold forward and do not jump. The platform launches you ahead much faster than taking every platform one by one.
steps.resetRisk: Jumping at the wrong moment can ruin the shortcut angle.
steps.rewardFocus: This is one of the fastest World 1 shortcuts for repeat clears.

steps.title: Memorize the maze route
steps.routeTip: Take the first right, keep following the path, turn right at the first intersection, then take the next right again.
steps.resetRisk: Guessing inside the maze wastes time and can send you in circles.
steps.rewardFocus: Route memory makes late World 1 clears much more stable.

steps.title: Keep momentum through World 2 hazards
steps.routeTip: For Stage 2, start right after the first gate opens. For Stage 7, keep moving while spiders fall. For Stage 8, run steadily through the fan gusts.
steps.resetRisk: Stopping in front of gates, spiders, or fans gives the hazards time to knock you off route.
steps.rewardFocus: These stages reward steady movement more than sudden direction changes.

steps.title: Follow the teddy maze pattern
steps.routeTip: Use the route Left, Right, Right, Right, Left to exit the maze while the teddy bear boss chases you.
steps.resetRisk: Wrong turns let the boss close the gap quickly.
steps.rewardFocus: Learning this path opens the route into the later World 2 stages.

steps.title: Enter the final World 2 stage with enough Speed
steps.routeTip: Stage 15 combines stairs, gates, long jumps, and chase pressure. Level 550+ gives enough Speed to clear the gaps more comfortably.
steps.resetRisk: Low Speed makes the mixed obstacle chain much harder to recover from.

keyboardEscapeFreeRewards.title: +1 Speed Keyboard Escape Free Rewards
keyboardEscapeFreeRewards.subtitle: Claim the free multiplier rewards before long farming sessions, then save flat Speed rewards until after early rebirths so they are not reset away.
keyboardEscapeFreeRewards.intro: These rewards help new players start faster without spending Robux. Medal Aura adds a free aura multiplier, while the group gift and social code give flat Speed boosts that are best claimed after your first few rebirths.

items.reward: Free Medal Aura with a 2x Speed multiplier
steps: Open Connected Accounts and link your Roblox account.
Run Medal in the background while playing +1 Speed Keyboard Escape.
Play for at least 15 seconds, press F8 to save a clip, then upload it publicly with the +1 Speed Keyboard Escape game tag.
Return to the game, open Inventory, go to Auras, and equip Medal Aura.
items.bestTimeToClaim: Claim early before long treadmill farming or stage grinding.
items.whyItMatters: It gives a free aura multiplier without spending Wins or Robux.

steps: Link Discord with your Roblox account if prompted.
Press Get Code to generate your one-time code.
Open the in-game Code button, paste the code, and redeem it.
items.bestTimeToClaim: Use after Rebirth 2 so the flat Speed boost is not wiped by early resets.
items.whyItMatters: It is one of the fastest free Speed boosts for a new account.

steps: Open the Roblox game page and like the experience.
Join the official Roblox community linked to the game.
Press the FREE gift button or open the lobby treasure box.
Use Verify and Claim to receive the reward.
items.bestTimeToClaim: Use after Rebirth 2 for better value.
items.whyItMatters: It gives another quick flat Speed boost with no Robux required.

steps: Open the shop icon on the left side of the screen.
Stand on your best treadmill while the boost is active.
items.bestTimeToClaim: Use during a focused treadmill farming session.
items.whyItMatters: The timer is short, so stacking it with a treadmill gives the best return.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about +1 Speed Keyboard Escape

questions.question: What are +1 Speed Keyboard Escape codes?
questions.answer: +1 Speed Keyboard Escape codes are free redeemable rewards that give flat Speed boosts. Open the Code button on the top-left of the screen, paste an active code, and press OK to claim Speed you can use for stage pushes or post-rebirth rebuilding.

questions.question: How do I get more Speed in +1 Speed Keyboard Escape?
questions.answer: In +1 Speed Keyboard Escape, every step gives +1 Speed by default. Farm faster by standing on Number Buttons, using treadmills, equipping Trails and Auras, and stacking Rebirth multipliers so each new session grows quicker than the last.

questions.question: When should I rebirth in +1 Speed Keyboard Escape?
questions.answer: Rebirth in +1 Speed Keyboard Escape as soon as your next level requirement starts slowing down. Rebirthing resets your current Speed level but grants a permanent multiplier, which makes all future walking, treadmill, and stage farming noticeably faster.

questions.question: What do treadmills do in +1 Speed Keyboard Escape?
questions.answer: Treadmills in +1 Speed Keyboard Escape let your character farm Speed while standing still. The free Chocolate treadmill gives a x1 multiplier, while paid treadmills scale up to x100, making them ideal for AFK Speed farming between active stage runs.

questions.question: How do Trails and Auras work in +1 Speed Keyboard Escape?
questions.answer: Trails and Auras in +1 Speed Keyboard Escape are multiplier gear purchased with Wins. Equip one Trail and one Aura together and keep upgrading as your Wins income grows, because both stack with treadmill and Rebirth multipliers for compounding Speed gains.

questions.question: Is +1 Speed Keyboard Escape free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. +1 Speed Keyboard Escape is a free Roblox obby. Optional Robux purchases like premium treadmills and Trails speed up progress, but all core gameplay, codes, social rewards, and the Medal Aura can be unlocked without spending Robux.
